title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners List
text: At the Golden Globes 2026, Hamnet won Best Motion Picture – Drama. The film secured the top drama prize at the 83rd Golden Globes ceremony held January 11, 2026, in Los Angeles. Director Chloé Zhao's adaptation also earned Best Screenplay recognition for Zhao and Maggie O'Farrell, while lead actress Jessie Buckley claimed Best Female Actor in a Drama Motion Picture for her performance. The production competed against Frankenstein, It Was Just an Accident, The Secret Agent, Sentimental Value, and Sinners in the category.
